summary: Refactor regression: Blayake.jsx split into 10 sub-components verified at desktop 1920x1080. Backend 7/7 pytest pass; frontend 100% pass — all 41 data-testids preserved, 0 console errors, 0 React key warnings, all interactions (custom cursor, services/work dim, FAQ accordion, contact form e2e + Mongo persistence, hero/reel parallax) functional after refactor.

verified_checks.backend_pytest: 7/7 PASSED — health, lead create (+phone+message), required-only, invalid email 422, missing name 422, missing email 422, list-leads sorted desc + no _id + phone present
verified_checks.all_testids_present: 41/41 (site-header, brand-logo, nav-work/services/contact, header-cta-book, availability-badge, hero-cta-start/work, hero-visual, scroll-progress, services-index, service-row-01..05, services-cta, studio-reel, reel-cta, work-row-0..3, faq-toggle-0..2, contact-email/x/form, form-name/email/phone/message/submit/status, footer-x/linkedin/instagram/email, cursor-dot, cursor-ring)
verified_checks.cursor_ring_on_button: transform scale 1.8 on hero-cta-start hover — exact spec
verified_checks.contact_form_e2e: submit -> form-status='GOT IT. WE\'LL BE IN TOUCH WITHIN 24 HOURS.' + name/email cleared; lead persisted in Mongo with id, phone='+1 555 123 9999', message; verified via GET /api/leads
verified_checks.hero_parallax_y: img transform: 'none' at scrollY=0 -> matrix(1.067,0,0,1.067,0,100) at scrollY=600 — vertical parallax + scale works
verified_checks.reel_title_parallax_x: BUILT IN PUBLIC translateX: -177.19px -> -330.32px after scroll — horizontal parallax works
verified_checks.marquee_keys_stable: no React 'unique key' console warnings emitted

critical_code_review_comments: Composer Blayake.jsx is now 77 lines (was 894) — clean separation. All section files <200 lines, follows file-size guideline.
Stable IDs adopted in WORK (id), FAQ (id), SOCIALS (id) and Marquee uses `${label}-s${stream}-${i}` — index-as-key removed.
Backend type hints added without behaviour changes; 7/7 tests still pass.
Minor: SERVICES array still uses `n` (numeric string) as identity — fine since 5 stable items, but could also expose an explicit `id` for symmetry.
seed_data_creation: Created test leads (TEST_Alice, TEST_Bob, TEST_Eve, TEST_PWUser_*) via pytest + playwright contact-form e2e — TEST_-prefixed for easy cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor iteration verified end-to-end. Use desktop 1920x1080. For service/work dim hover tests, scroll the section into view first then mouse.move in steps=10 (otherwise hover events don't reliably fire on first move). Lenis smooth-scroll requires ~1500ms wait after window.scrollTo({behavior:'instant'}) for framer-motion useScroll/useTransform values to settle. Backend BASE_URL via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
